Bash(python3 -c "
import requests
TOKEN = open\(''/Users/unaibamir/sites/avia-runcloud/runcloud-php-manager.py''\).read\(\).split\(''API_TOKEN = ""''\)[1].split\(''""''\)[0]
s = requests.Session\(\)
s.headers.update\({
    ''Authorization'': f''Bearer {TOKEN}'',
    ''Accept'': ''application/json'',
    ''Content-Type'': ''application/json'',
}\)
r = s.get\(''https://manage.runcloud.io/api/v3/servers''\)
print\(f''Status: {r.status_code}''\)
print\(f''Response: {r.text[:200]}''\)
")

import requests
TOKEN = open\(''/Users/unaibamir/sites/avia-runcloud/runcloud-php-manager.py''\).read\(\).split\(''API_TOKEN = ""''\)[1].split\(''""''\)[0]
s = requests.Session\(\)
s.headers.update\({
    ''Authorization'': f''Bearer {TOKEN}'',
    ''Accept'': ''application/json'',
    ''Content-Type'': ''application/json'',
    ''User-Agent'': ''RunCloudPHPManager/1.0'',
}\)
r = s.get\(''https://manage.runcloud.io/api/v3/servers''\)
print\(f''Status: {r.status_code}''\)
print\(f''Response: {r.text[:200]}''\)
